title: Knockout Reilly
writer: Pierre Collings, John W. Conway, Kenneth Raisbeck
actors: Richard Dix, Mary Brian, Jack Renault
plot: At a cabaret, steel worker Dundee Reilly meets Mary Malone, sister of former boxing champion Pat Malone. When Mary is accosted by prizefighter Killer Agerra, Dundee knocks his rival unconscious. Under Pat's guidance, Dundee trains...
